content.title: Uday Varmora — Cloud Engineer 1
content.summary: Cloud Engineer with **1+ year** architecting and operating **AWS production infrastructure** — sustaining **99.9% uptime SLA**, reducing compute costs **30% ($500+/month)**, and provisioning **80% faster** across multi-AZ, multi-region deployments. Hands-on with **EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, Terraform, CloudFormation, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Python/Bash** on **Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL)**.
skills: AWS — EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, ECR, RDS (Aurora PostgreSQL), VPC, IAM, KMS, CloudWatch, CloudFront, EFS, DynamoDB; Azure (Fundamentals)
Terraform (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking), AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM, Ansible
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift), Helm, ArgoCD, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, CloudWatch, ELK Stack, Datadog
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator, IAM least-privilege, TLS/SSL
Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration

bullets: Architected and operated production **AWS infrastructure** spanning **EC2, EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, VPC, IAM, and CloudWatch** across multi-AZ deployments — supporting **20+ Dockerised microservices** with **99.9% uptime** and automated failover.

Provisioned multi-environment AWS infrastructure on **Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL)** using **Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — reducing provisioning time by **80%** and configuration drift by **95%** across Dev, Staging, and Production environments.

Reduced **AWS compute costs by 30% ($500+/month)** through **Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification**, **KEDA off-hours scale-down**, and right-sized cluster capacity — preserving production availability while improving cluster resource utilization across 20+ services.

Operated **Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift)** clusters with **ArgoCD GitOps, Helm, and Ingress-NGINX Controller** — managing zero-downtime rollouts, Karpenter node autoscaling, and KEDA event-driven scaling; sustained **99.9% uptime** across multi-AZ clusters.

Developed **Python and Bash** automation to eliminate **~70% of recurring operational toil** — covering cluster operations, log triage, secret rotation, and pipeline scripting; integrated SonarQube quality gates and **Git** code-review workflows into CI/CD.

Built and maintained AWS infrastructure monitoring on **Linux-based environments**, configured CloudWatch dashboards, and triaged production incidents across Kubernetes workloads; authored operational runbooks for recurring issue patterns and root-cause analyses.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Build & Deploy Infrastructure
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · Docker · Jenkins · GitLab CI/CD · GitHub Actions · AWS CodePipeline · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana
bullets: Designed multi-environment **AWS architecture** with per-environment **VPC isolation**, S3/DynamoDB remote state, and Ingress-NGINX Controller on Linux-based EKS nodes; executed zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)**.
Reduced compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)** via Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification and KEDA off-hours scale-down; migrated deprecated loki-stack to Loki + Grafana Alloy.
Built **multi-region disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (with EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication, and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour**.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Architected serverless build/deploy system using **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** — enabling deployment of **30+ Python Lambda functions** with reproducible packaging and per-function least-privilege IAM.
Solved Lambda layer size constraints by engineering a shared **EFS-mounted Python dependency layer** across 30+ functions — eliminating packaging bottlenecks and cutting build times by **60%+**.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Engineered **split-hosting architecture** (S3/CloudFront frontend, Dockerised App Runner backend) with **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — enabling zero-downtime redeployments and **~30% reduced image pull latency** while serving **500+ concurrent users**.

Automated full release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation, and App Runner deploy; applied least-privilege IAM scoping that removed **5+ overly permissive roles**.

education.left: **B.Tech, Information Technology** — Dharmsinh Desai University, Gujarat, India  |  CGPA: 7.25 / 10

achievements: Awarded **“Student of the Year”** in Class 10 for outstanding academic performance and leadership contributions.

jd:
Role: Cloud Engineer 1
Company: IQVIA
Location: Bangalore, Karnataka
